'''lashoko''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:tabard|tabard]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-sh-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tabard|tabard]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| lashoko
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:læsheketh|læsheketh]] || [[word:læshekej|læshekej]] || [[word:læshekesh|læshekesh]] || [[word:læsheke|læsheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:lashoshokoth|lashoshokoth]] || [[word:lashoshokoj|lashoshokoj]] || [[word:lashoshokosh|lashoshokosh]] || [[word:lashoshoko|lashoshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:lashokoth|lashokoth]] || [[word:lashokoj|lashokoj]] || [[word:lashokosh|lashokosh]] || [[word:lashoko|lashoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:lashofkoth|lashofkoth]] || [[word:lashofkoj|lashofkoj]] || [[word:lashofkosh|lashofkosh]] || [[word:lashofkof|lashofkof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:lashokotho|lashokotho]] || [[word:lashokojo|lashokojo]] || [[word:lashokosho|lashokosho]] || [[word:lashokoko|lashokoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:lashokoth|lashokoth]] || [[word:lashokoj|lashokoj]] || [[word:lashokosh|lashokosh]] || [[word:lashoko|lashoko]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:lashokothol|lashokothol]] || [[word:lashokojol|lashokojol]] || [[word:lashokoshol|lashokoshol]] || [[word:lashokokol|lashokokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:lashokothotho|lashokothotho]] || [[word:lashokojojo|lashokojojo]] || [[word:lashokoshosho|lashokoshosho]] || [[word:lashokoko|lashokoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:lashokothon|lashokothon]] || [[word:lashokojon|lashokojon]] || [[word:lashokoshon|lashokoshon]] || [[word:lashokokon|lashokokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:lashokothoro|lashokothoro]] || [[word:lashokojoro|lashokojoro]] || [[word:lashokoshoro|lashokoshoro]] || [[word:lashokokoro|lashokokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
